scripts.build: pnpm -r --if-present run build || npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck || npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check: pnpm -r --if-present run check || npm run check --workspaces --if-present
scripts.fix: pnpm -r --if-present run fix || npm run fix --workspaces --if-present
